nasb.text: There were seven brothers; and the first took a wife, and died leaving no children.

esv.text: There were seven brothers; the first took a wife, and when he died left no offspring.

cnv.text: 從前有兄弟七人，頭一個娶了妻子，死了，沒有留下孩子；

ccb.text: 有弟兄七人，老大结了婚，没有孩子就死了。

csbs.text: 曾经有兄弟七人，第一个娶了妻子，死去了，没有留下后裔。
